column1: #   mana_cost         - Mana required to cast (0 for stamina-only abilities)
#   cooldown_s        - Seconds before spell can be recast
#   aoe_m             - Area of effect radius (0 = single target)
#   damage_base       - Base damage (0 for non-damage spells)
#   healing_base      - Base healing (0 for non-healing spells)
#   skill_required    - Skill name needed (empty = no skill)
